title: cynoglossum cheirifolium subvar. tubuliflorum
intro: Cynoglossum cheirifolium subvar. tubuliflorum is a subvariety of the Harebell of the Alps plant, a type of flowering perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Its health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
